overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving on a rain-soaked elevated highway through the Watson district. The scene features heavy fog, futuristic megabuildings, flying vehicles, and moderate traffic before decelerating to a stop at an industrial facility entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway through futuristic urban district

events.description: purple sports car overtakes rapidly on the right side
white vintage sedan passes on the right while maintaining high speed

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the rain-slicked elevated highway, maintaining center lane position through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: purple sports car overtaking at high speed on the right
white sedan merging into traffic flow from the right

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage visible through the fog
concrete safety barrier with metal railings separating lanes from the city drop
tall dual-arm street lamps with warm orange glow lining the highway
large dark industrial building with ventilation structures and blue accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-speed driving on a rain-soaked elevated highway through a futuristic city. Massive glass megabuildings loom on the left through the fog, while the camera vehicle navigates moderate traffic including a purple sports car and white sedan overtaking on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approaching industrial zone with air traffic

events.description: flying hover car descends and passes overhead above the highway
red classic sedan overtakes closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while a flying vehicle passes overhead, navigating through traffic with the industrial facility approaching

notable_agents.action: flying hover car descending from above and passing overhead
red vintage sedan overtaking rapidly on the right

entered.detail: dark colored hover car with glowing thrusters flying above the highway traffic

segments.scene_description: Driving continues at high speed as a flying vehicle descends and passes overhead, highlighting the futuristic setting. The megabuildings fade into the fog behind while the industrial facility ahead grows larger. Traffic remains moderate with a red vintage sedan overtaking on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to industrial facility with decreasing speed

events.description: vehicle begins to decelerate significantly from highway speed
brown van passes on the right as the camera vehicle slows down

agents.ego_description: decelerating rapidly from highway speed, allowing faster traffic to pass by while approaching the industrial facility entrance

notable_agents.action: brown delivery van overtaking as the ego vehicle slows significantly

segments.scene_description: The vehicle begins to slow down significantly on the wet highway, transitioning from high-speed travel to an approach maneuver. The industrial facility ahead looms larger in the center of the frame while traffic continues to pass by on the right, including a brown van.

events.description: vehicle comes to a near stop facing the industrial facility entrance

agents.ego_description: crawling to a halt on the rain-soaked pavement, facing the entrance of the industrial building with minimal surrounding traffic

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle slowing to a complete stop on the wet highway, now positioned directly facing the industrial facility entrance. The surrounding traffic has cleared, leaving a quiet, rain-soaked approach to the building with street lights passing by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive along a rain-soaked elevated highway that gradually decelerates into a quiet stop at an industrial facility. It begins with the camera navigating moderate traffic past massive glass megabuildings looming through a dense fog, while a purple sports car and white sedan overtake on the right. As the vehicle maintains its speed, a flying craft descends overhead and the city skyline fades into the mist, giving way to the growing silhouette of an industrial complex ahead. The scene then shifts as the vehicle slows significantly, passing a brown van while the facility entrance looms larger in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera comes to a complete stop on the wet pavement, leaving the surrounding traffic behind to face the silent, rain-streaked entrance under the glow of passing street lights.
